Featured Project
Crickrida
IPL Analytics & Intelligence Platform

A full-stack IPL analytics platform delivering real-time scores, 17+ years of historical insights, AI-powered cricket intelligence, and interactive data visualizations — built with a cinematic dark UI and designed for cricket enthusiasts who think in data.
